'''Jerv Riske''', a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], was a former [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] who served as the personal bodyguard of [[Passel Argente/Legends|Passel Argente]]. He teamed up with [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], and [[Lorana Jinzler]] to foil an assassination plot against the [[Corporate Alliance/Legends|Corporate Alliance]] leader, although it was [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Jorus C'baoth]] who was finally responsible for saving Argente's life.

==Biography==
When [[Corporate Alliance/Legends|Corporate Alliance]] leader [[Passel Argente/Legends|Passel Argente]] traveled to the planet [[Barlok/Legends|Barlok]] for a round of negotiations with the [[Mining Guild/Legends|mining guild]], Riske, who had quit his job as a [[bounty hunter]], served as his loyal bodyguard.<ref name="Outbound Flight" />

Inside the eating establishment [[Panky's]], Riske encountered a trio of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]: [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Lorana Jinzler]]. Kenobi was the only one of the trio who recognized him, but Riske knew the caliber of beings he was dealing with and tried to escape while Kenobi and Skywalker were distracted. However, after being pursued by Jinzler, [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Jorus C'baoth|C'baoth]]'s [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], he paused to confront the young Jedi. Riske was immediately forthright with her, explaining the reasons for his presence on the planet, but likewise inquired about the objectives of the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]] in sending its representatives there. After Jinzler responded in kind, the two parted ways.<ref name="Outbound Flight" />

Later, Kenobi and Skywalker encountered Riske again in their continuing investigations,. He apologized for Jinzler's disappearance and told the Jedi that Jinzler was very nice, but was not combat savvy. Riske then informed Kenobi and Skywalker he wished he had planted a [[Homing beacon/Legends|tracker]] on Jinzler, as finding her would have led them to finding [[Jhompfi]]'s guild. Riske then returned to his own investigations and preparations for the Corporate Alliance-Barlok mining guild negotiations set for the following day.<ref name="Outbound Flight" />
